pages.text:
MAUNO HENRIK KOIVISTO

President of the Republic of Finland make known

WHEREAS the Ministerial Conference of the Oslo and Paris Commissions for the adoption of the Convention for the Protection of the Marine Environment of the

North East Atlantic will be held in Paris from 21 to 22 September 1992;

NOW THEREFORE I hereby make known that the Government of Finland have appointed Ms. Sirpa PIETIKÄINEN, the Minister of Environment, as the

Representative of Finland, and Mr. Matti HÄKKÄNEN Ambassador of Finland in

Paris, Mr. Risto RAUTIAINEN, Counsellor, Ministry for Foreign Affairs, Mr.

Julius LASSIG, Senior Inspector, Ministry of Environment, and Ms. Minna

PYLKKÄNEN, Senior Inspector, Ministry of Environment, as Alternate

Representatives to the said Conference. The said Representative and Alternate

Representatives are fully authorized to take part in the meeting, to transact all such matters as may appertain to their work and to vote with the other

Representatives in accordance with the agreed procedures;

and have also authorized Ms. Sirpa PIETIKÄINEN, Minister of Environment, or in case of her absence, Mr. Matti HÄKKÄNEN, Ambassador of Finland in Paris, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Finland, the said Convention to be adopted by the Conference.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF I have hereunto set my own hand and caused my seal to be affixed to these presents.

DONE at Helsinki this 18th day of September 1992.

Pears dann
